prompt_text: Best way to onboard new hires with automated checklists and welcome flows for a small UK-based companies with 10 to 100 employees team
response:
# Onboarding Solutions for Small UK Companies

## Best Approach for Your Size

**Hybrid model** works best for 10-100 employees:
- Automate repetitive admin tasks
- Maintain personal touchpoints
- Scale without losing culture

---

## Recommended Tools & Stack

### All-in-One Solutions (Easiest)
| Tool | Best For | Cost |
|------|----------|------|
| **Deel** | Global hiring + onboarding | Free → £12/user/month |
| **BambooHR** | Small-medium teams | £5-8/employee/month |
| **Guidepoint** | Structured flows | From £500/month |
| **Factorial** | HR + payroll integration | £3/employee/month |

### Lightweight/Free Options
- **Google Forms** + spreadsheet tracker (minimal but works)
- **Notion** templates (free, customizable)
- **HubSpot CRM** (free tier has decent automation)

---

## What Your Checklist Should Include

### **Pre-Arrival (1-2 weeks before)**
- [ ] IT equipment order
- [ ] Workspace setup
- [ ] Background checks completion
- [ ] Welcome email sent
- [ ] Systems access created (email, Slack, etc.)
- [ ] Emergency contact verification

### **Day 1**
- [ ] Office tour
- [ ] Health & safety briefing
- [ ] IT setup & password reset
- [ ] Team introductions (assigned buddy/mentor)
- [ ] Brief role overview

### **Week 1**
- [ ] Department-specific training
- [ ] Company culture/policies handbook
- [ ] Systems training (accounting, timesheets, etc.)
- [ ] 1:1 with direct manager
- [ ] Lunch with team

### **Month 1**
- [ ] Key stakeholder meetings
- [ ] Project assignment kickoff
- [ ] 30-day check-in (manager + HR)

### **Month 3**
- [ ] Full probation review
- [ ] Feedback survey
- [ ] Role clarity discussion

---

## Implementation Strategy

### **Phase 1: Setup (Week 1)**
1. Choose tool based on payroll integration needs
2. Map your exact process (ask existing team)
3. Create template checklists by role type

### **Phase 2: Automation (Week 2-3)**
- Auto-trigger welcome email on hire date
- Set task reminders to managers
- Link to documents (employee handbook, contracts)
- Automatic access provisioning (if tool supports)

### **Phase 3: Human Touch**
- **Buddy system**: Assign peer mentor (automated assignment)
- **Welcome pack**: Physical or digital welcome gift
- **CEO message**: Personal note from leadership
- **1:1 scheduling**: Auto-calendar invites

---

## UK-Specific Considerations

✅ **Legal requirements to automate**
- Right to Work verification
- DBS checks (if applicable)
- GDPR data collection forms
- P45/P46 collection

✅ **PAYE/Payroll integration**
- Sync with Sage, Xero, or FreeAgent
- Auto-include tax code requests
- Pension auto-enrollment documentation

✅ **Employee handbook**
- Store legally-reviewed version centrally
- Get signed acknowledgment (automated)
- Track training completion

---

## Cost-Effective Quick Start

**For £10-50k/year budget:**

1. **Tier 1**: Factorial (payroll sync) + Slack automation = £50-200/month
2. **Tier 2**: BambooHR standalone + Zapier integration = £200-400/month
3. **DIY**: Notion + Zapier + Google Workspace = £30-50/month

---

## Red Flags to Avoid

❌ Over-automating personal interactions
❌ Forgetting probationary period check-ins
❌ Not updating checklists annually
❌ Tools with poor mobile experience (managers need mobile access)
❌ Neglecting manager training on system usage

---

## Quick Win (Start This Week)

Create **Google Forms** + **simple Sheets tracker**:
- Pre-arrival form (equipment needs, emergency contact)
- Daily checklist (Day 1, Week 1, Month 1)
- Set Google Calendar reminders for managers
